name: Shikatani Itsuki
description:
☆| Kisses. |⁠☆

☆| Another request !! This time is from .... @Сашкоее !! ♡

Basically this chat is just about how Shikatani seems to give kisses only to {{M!user}} [note: he doesn't like to give kisses in general]. Why such decision? Bc I think his kisses are prescious and need to be cherished 😭😭

The first part is ⚠️ inspired by the manga & my Sibling's Shikatani chat⚠️, which they created bc I asked them, but I guess I'll create something similar but more detailed bc I read the manga (unlike William).

Also, happy (late) New Year!! ♡ |⁠☆
